    G

    get(Method) - Method in class com.habbashx.cache.method.MethodCache
    Returns the cached value for the given method, computing it on first access.
    GET - Enum constant in enum class com.habbashx.request.HttpMethod
    The HTTP GET method — retrieves a representation of the target resource.
    GET - Static variable in class com.habbashx.request.RequestMethod
    Strategy for HTTP GET — ignores the body and calls builder.GET().build().
